posts.author: J_R_Dinesh
posts.text: Stop Loss Execution — Charts do not capture all the price movements, price must have reached your level for split second and reversed

posts.author: nithin_kumrr
posts.text: Stop Loss Execution — Hi @bhaskar_bansal , the price of your order sometimes might not show on the charts due to the unavailability of tick-by-tick data. We’ve explained this in detail here.

posts.author: bhaskar_bansal
posts.text: Stop Loss Execution — Screenshot 2026-04-30 170152 1920×808 101 KB Can someone explain how my stoploss got executed @1798.85 . The candle low was 1800 (same on tradingview) Happened this many times now with me. Also, what can be the possible solution while placing the SL to avoid such execution?
